code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when None
  println("YES")
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b > 32
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if have_prev
            if v < prev
              sorted = false
            end
          end
          prev = v
          have_prev = true
        when None
          sorted = sorted
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
